summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 6 new Trade Monitor page enhancements. All features verified working correctly through both backend API tests (11/11 passed) and frontend UI tests via Playwright.
passed_tests: Feature 1a: Active Signal card displays Radio icon with 'Active Signal' header ✓
Feature 1b: Current trading date (Sunday, January 11, 2026) shown in Active Signal card header ✓
Feature 1c: No Edit button in Active Signal card (correctly removed) ✓
Feature 2: Timezone conversion shows correct local time (09:00 Manila = 5:00 PM LA -1 day) ✓
Feature 3: Trade History table displays with all 9 columns (Date, Product, Direction, LOT Size, Time Set, Time Entered, Projected, Actual, P/L Diff) ✓
Feature 4a: Trade History pagination works (prev/next buttons, page count) ✓
Feature 4b: Time Entered column is editable with pencil icon ✓
Feature 4c: Time input field appears with save/cancel buttons when editing ✓
Feature 4d: Time update persists and shows toast notification ✓
Feature 5: Streak fire icon appears with count (1 streak) at top right of Trade History ✓
Feature 6: SIMULATED signals show Flask icon tag instead of [SIMULATED] text in notes ✓
API: GET /api/trade/history returns paginated data with signal_details ✓

tests: test_trade_history_pagination - Page 1 and 2 have different trades ✓
test_streak_endpoint_exists - Returns streak count and type ✓
test_create_simulated_signal_no_prefix - Notes clean, uses is_simulated flag ✓

critical_code_review_comments: All 6 Trade Monitor V2 enhancements implemented correctly in TradeMonitorPage.jsx
Active Signal card redesigned with Radio icon, date display, no edit button
SIMULATED tag uses Flask icon instead of [SIMULATED] text prefix
Timezone conversion using offset-based calculation working correctly
Trade History table has all 9 required columns with proper data
Pagination working with prev/next buttons and page count
Time Entered column editable with pencil icon, save/cancel buttons
Streak indicator with fire icon displays at top right of Trade History
seed_data_creation: Created simulated signal for testing Active Signal card display
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 Trade Monitor V2 enhancements fully tested and working. Key features: 1) Active Signal card redesigned with Radio icon, current date, no edit button, 2) SIMULATED tag uses Flask icon, 3) Timezone conversion shows user local time (e.g., 09:00 Manila = 5:00 PM LA -1 day), 4) Trade History table with all 9 columns and pagination, 5) Time Entered column editable with pencil icon, 6) Streak fire icon with count at top right. Backend has 3 new endpoints: /trade/history, /trade/logs/{id}/time-entered, /trade/streak.

streak_indicator.position: top right of Trade History card
